name: AgentXP
description: Capture agent reasoning traces and publish experiences to the AgentXP relay.

relayUrl.description: Base URL of the AgentXP relay that receives staged experiences.

operatorPublicKey.description: Ed25519 operator public key (hex) that owns the agent identity.

agentKeyPath.description: Local filesystem path to the delegated agent Ed25519 secret key.

defaultVisibility.description: Default visibility applied to published experiences.

stagingDbPath.description: SQLite path where reasoning traces and staged experiences are persisted.

autoFlushSteps.description: Auto-stage a session's captured trace after this many tool calls. 0 disables the count trigger. Fallback for hosts that may not fire session_end.

autoFlushIdleMs.description: Auto-stage a session's captured trace after this many milliseconds of inactivity. 0 disables the idle trigger. Fallback for hosts that may not fire session_end.

publishIntervalMs.description: How often (in milliseconds) the plugin drains staged experiences to the relay. 0 disables background publishing (staged rows accumulate locally until a manual flush).
